series_metadata.series_description: Audit packs that are closed for settlement on a particular year. Packs contain 13 legal size folders scheduled as follows and containing the audit work papers. 1. Cost Report, 2. General, 3. Exit, 4. Assets, 5. Property, 6. Liabilities, 7. Equity, 8. Personal Allowance, 9. Statistics, 10. Revenue, 11. Expenses, 12. Payroll, and 13. Cash Disbursement.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area until adjudication, then store in records center 7 years from the date of adjudication. Destroy after review by the Chief of Long-term Care ; Electronic: Retain Machine Readable copies in office for 7 years after the date of adjudication. Destroy after review by the Chief of Long-term Care, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
